title: INNER JOIN gives the results of a CROSS JOIN
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test.foo (key_var Int32 NOT NULL, value_var2 Float64);
CREATE TABLE test.bar (key_var Int32 NOT NULL, value_var1 String);
SELECT f.key_var, f.value_var2, b.value_var1 FROM test.foo AS f INNER JOIN test.bar AS b ON f.key_var = b.key_var;
key_bug_features: INNER JOIN behaves like a CROSS JOIN
